desc.en: Nanning Rail Transit 2030+Plan, which includes Line 6, Airport Line, North Extension of Line 1, Phase 3 of Line 2, South Extension of Line 3, and North Extension of Phase 2 of Line 5 on the current Lines 1-5
desc.zh-Hans: 南宁轨道交通2030+规划，此规划在现1-5号线上，还加入了6号线、机场线、1号线北延段、2号线三期、3号线南延段以及5号线二期北延段

updateHistory.reason: Revised some table annotations. Otimized the route direction. Added stations in the rear section of Line 4.
更新线路标识位置及3号线的走向
Fix position of Convention and Exhibition Center Station. Also fixing station translations such as CHUANGYE LU.
